problem_text_cn: 1453 用实验求空气自然对流和强迫对流条件下，热量传递符合的函数式。对流条件下$\frac{\Delta Q}{\Delta t} = E(\theta - \theta_0)^m$，$\frac{\Delta Q}{\Delta t} = Mc\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t}$，联立得$\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t} = k(\theta - \theta_0)^m$，取对数$\ln\left(\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t}\right) = m\ln(\theta - \theta_0) + \ln k$，拟合求$m$和$k$。自然对流：$\theta_0 = 10.0\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，拟合得$m = 1.25$，$k = 0.0027$，$\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t} = 0.0027(\theta - \theta_0)^{1.25}$；强迫对流：$\theta_0 = 14.8\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，拟合得$m = 1.05$，$k = 0.023$，$\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t} = 0.023(\theta - \theta_0)^{1.05}$。
problem_text_en: 1453 Use experiments to find the functional form of heat transfer under natural and forced convection of air. Under convection, $\frac{\Delta Q}{\Delta t} = E(\theta - \theta_0)^m$, $\frac{\Delta Q}{\Delta t} = Mc\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t}$. Combining gives $\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t} = k(\theta - \theta_0)^m$. Take logarithm: $\ln\left(\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t}\right) = m\ln(\theta - \theta_0) + \ln k$, fit to find $m$ and $k$. Natural convection: $\theta_0 = 10.0\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, fitting gives $m = 1.25$, $k = 0.0027$, $\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t} = 0.0027(\theta - \theta_0)^{1.25}$; Forced convection: $\theta_0 = 14.8\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, fitting gives $m = 1.05$, $k = 0.023$, $\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t} = 0.023(\theta - \theta_0)^{1.05}$.
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】由量热学$\frac{\Delta Q}{\Delta t} = Mc\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t}$，代入对流公式$\frac{\Delta Q}{\Delta t} = E(\theta - \theta_0)^m$，得$\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t} = k(\theta - \theta_0)^m$，取对数线性拟合求$m$和$k$。自然对流：测$\theta-t$关系，拟合得$m = 1.25$，$k = 0.0027$；强迫对流：开小风扇，测$\theta-t$关系，拟合得$m = 1.05$，$k = 0.023$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】From calorimetry $\frac{\Delta Q}{\Delta t} = Mc\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t}$, substitute into convection formula $\frac{\Delta Q}{\Delta t} = E(\theta - \theta_0)^m$, get $\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t} = k(\theta - \theta_0)^m$, take logarithm and fit linearly to find $m$ and $k$. Natural convection: measure $\theta-t$ relationship, fit to get $m = 1.25$, $k = 0.0027$; Forced convection: turn on small fan, measure $\theta-t$ relationship, fit to get $m = 1.05$, $k = 0.023$.
problem_answer: 自然对流冷却公式：$\boldsymbol{\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t} = 0.0027(\theta - \theta_0)^{1.25}}$；强迫对流冷却公式：$\boldsymbol{\frac{\Delta \theta}{\Delta t} = 0.023(\theta - \theta_0)^{1.05}}$；测量关键：对数线性拟合求指数$m$。
